CancelSolNetworkOperation.description: Grants permission to cancel a network operation

CreateSolFunctionPackage.description: Grants permission to create a function package

CreateSolNetworkInstance.description: Grants permission to create a network instance

CreateSolNetworkPackage.description: Grants permission to create a network package

DeleteSolFunctionPackage.description: Grants permission to delete a function package

DeleteSolNetworkInstance.description: Grants permission to delete a network instance

DeleteSolNetworkPackage.description: Grants permission to delete a network package

GetSolFunctionInstance.description: Grants permission to get a function instance

GetSolFunctionPackage.description: Grants permission to get a function package

GetSolFunctionPackageContent.description: Grants permission to get a function package contents

GetSolFunctionPackageDescriptor.description: Grants permission to get a function package descriptor

GetSolNetworkInstance.description: Grants permission to get a network instance

GetSolNetworkOperation.description: Grants permission to get a network operation

GetSolNetworkPackage.description: Grants permission to get a network package

GetSolNetworkPackageContent.description: Grants permission to get a network package contents

GetSolNetworkPackageDescriptor.description: Grants permission to get a network package descriptor

InstantiateSolNetworkInstance.description: Grants permission to instantiate a network instance

ListSolFunctionInstances.description: Grants permission to list function instances

ListSolFunctionPackages.description: Grants permission to list function packages

ListSolNetworkInstances.description: Grants permission to list network instances

ListSolNetworkOperations.description: Grants permission to list network operations

ListSolNetworkPackages.description: Grants permission to list network packages

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to return a list of tags for a resource

PutSolFunctionPackageContent.description: Grants permission to upload function package content

PutSolNetworkPackageContent.description: Grants permission to upload network package content

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to the specified resource

TerminateSolNetworkInstance.description: Grants permission to terminate a network instance

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from the specified resource

UpdateSolFunctionPackage.description: Grants permission to update a function package

UpdateSolNetworkInstance.description: Grants permission to update a network instance

UpdateSolNetworkPackage.description: Grants permission to update a network package

ValidateSolFunctionPackageContent.description: Grants permission to validate function package content

ValidateSolNetworkPackageContent.description: Grants permission to validate network package content

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by checking the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by checking tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by presence of tag keys in the request
